name: ai-obsidian
description: Obsidian workflow toolkit for vault setup, task management, reporting, research, and Claude Code/Codex session scanning

interface.shortDescription: Manage Obsidian work and scan coding sessions.
interface.longDescription: Obsidian skills for vault initialization, Markdown task management, work reports, open-source research, and evidence-based Claude Code/Codex session scanning.
defaultPrompt: Set up this folder as an Obsidian work vault.
Create a work report from this project's Obsidian tasks.
Scan yesterday's Claude Code and Codex sessions and summarize the work evidence.
